title: High Stakes LOSERS FINALS - Miiya (Steve, Game & Watch, Incineroar) Vs. acola (Game & Watch) SSBU
caption: Repeatedly denies Incineroar's ledge grab with Dash Attack, then cleanly shuts down the recovery Side B attempts with Up B and Bair drag-down. A thorough, methodical edgeguard that showcases the player's skill — a solid 4-point clip.

title: High Stakes LOSERS FINALS - Miiya (Steve, Game & Watch, Incineroar) Vs. acola (Game & Watch) SSBU

title: High Stakes LOSERS FINALS - Miiya (Steve, Game & Watch, Incineroar) Vs. acola (Game & Watch) SSBU
caption: Landing punish with Nair into airdodge-read Dash Attack, pushing offstage, then intercepting the low recovery with Up B. Placing a Bair where the opponent's route is limited for a clean edgeguard. Considering the well-constructed edgeguard sequence, 4 points.

Sumapa 188 TOP 8 - Eim (Sheik) Vs. KEN (Sonic, Sephiroth) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Places an Usmash against Sheik's Bair, using the superior range of a long-reaching weapon to score the KO. Bold commitment to a laggy move that pays off nicely.

title: Sumapa 188 TOP 8 - Eim (Sheik) Vs. KEN (Sonic, Sephiroth) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Reading the opponent's jump and landing Neutral B from a high angle, then confirming into Down B for the KO. Quickly and accurately executing the combo on Sheik, who has difficulty getting KOs, makes it visually appealing, 5 points is fair.

title: Sumapa 188 TOP 8 - Eim (Sheik) Vs. KEN (Sonic, Sephiroth) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Pushing offstage with Jab then maintaining advantage with Neutral B. When the opponent desperately does a getup attack, landing a parry and finishing with Dsmash. A very cool play, 5 points is fair.

title: Sumapa 188 TOP 8 - Eim (Sheik) Vs. KEN (Sonic, Sephiroth) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Lands a Dash Attack on Sheik's forward step for the KO. The kill itself is unremarkable, but the preceding neutral exchanges and Sheik's pressure show extremely high-level footsies, warranting 2 points.

title: Sumapa 188 TOP 8 - Eim (Sheik) Vs. KEN (Sonic, Sephiroth) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: B-reversing to dodge the opponent's attack while landing Neutral B, then connecting into Down B for a combo KO. A fast-paced satisfying clip, 4 points is fair.

title: Sumapa 188 TOP 8 - Eim (Sheik) Vs. KEN (Sonic, Sephiroth) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Whiff punishes Sheik's Nair with Bair for the KO. A very Sephiroth-like kill using the range advantage, but ultimately simple — 2 points.

title: Sumapa 188 TOP 8 - Eim (Sheik) Vs. KEN (Sonic, Sephiroth) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
Sumapa 188 TOP 8 - Eim (Sheik) Vs. KEN (Sonic, Sephiroth) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: A kill combo using B-reverse aerial Neutral B into landing Down B. Since Sheik struggles to KO, incorporating creative kill setups like this is necessary — a great character-specific clip.

title: Sumapa 188 TOP 8 - Eim (Sheik) Vs. KEN (Sonic, Sephiroth) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Measuring spacing with steps then rushing in with Dash Attack for the KO. Clean as an approach but no highlight as a clip so it settles around 2 points.

title: Sumapa 188 TOP 8 - Eim (Sheik) Vs. KEN (Sonic, Sephiroth) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Confirms Sephiroth's Dair with a quick Ftilt pickup into Nair for advantage, reads the airdodge to land another sweetspot Nair into landing, then confirms Down B. A beautiful Sheik kill sequence.

title: Sumapa 188 - shirome (Toon Link) Vs. ATATA (Ness) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: A great clip showing deep Toon Link knowledge. Sets up a landing punish with Utilt to Uair, then shields Ness's panic Nair landing and follows up with a bomb drop Uair combo for the KO.

title: Sumapa 188 - shirome (Toon Link) Vs. ATATA (Ness) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Using Up B to pressure the opponent on stage, then on the way up confirming Fair landing into grab and finishing with Back Throw KO. The read was good but it's also a simple sequence so 2 points is fair.

title: Sumapa 188 - shirome (Toon Link) Vs. ATATA (Ness) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: A simple bomb throw into Uair. A very basic Toon Link combo with nothing surprising or interesting — 1 point.

title: Sumapa 188 - shirome (Toon Link) Vs. ATATA (Ness) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
Sumapa 188 - shirome (Toon Link) Vs. ATATA (Ness) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
Sumapa 188 - shirome (Toon Link) Vs. ATATA (Ness) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Lands Toon Link's Dair — a notoriously hard move to connect — for the meteor KO. Dodges the opponent's Fair attempt during their recovery while landing the maximum punish, making this very impressive to watch.

title: Sumapa 188 - shirome (Toon Link) Vs. ATATA (Ness) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
Sumapa 188 - shirome (Toon Link) Vs. ATATA (Ness) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Confirming down state off Flip Kick's hook, connecting Side B, then confirming into Fair for the KO combo. Great confirmation and combo precision.

title: Sumapa 188 - shirome (Toon Link) Vs. ATATA (Ness) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Baiting the opponent's airdodge with opening Side B etc. and making them fall. Considering the distance was insufficient suggesting a mistake, even accounting for the fast-paced opening, around 2 points.

title: Sumapa 188 - shirome (Toon Link) Vs. ATATA (Ness) Smash Ultimate - SSBU

【スマブラSP】篝火#3 LSF GW|ザクレイ(ワリオ,ジョーカー) vs アカキクス(勇者)
caption: An excellent clip where the KO comes in nearly one continuous sequence. Nair catches a ledge getup into Side B, forcing another ledge grab, then reads ledge drop double jump airdodge with a grab into Back Throw. Hero uses spells to pressure while barely recovering, lands an Utilt to regain momentum, but gets hit back with Bair. Even confirms Hero's Zoom recovery with a perfectly timed grab into another Back Throw. Hero barely makes it back to ledge again, but a first-hit Fair on the spot dodge into Uair drag-down to Dsmash seals it. Exceptional player skill on display throughout.

caption: A quintessential Zakrei Pit KO. After Back Throw, remotely controls Neutral B arrows to cover multiple angles, completely restricting the opponent's options before landing a pinpoint Dair meteor. An exhilarating clip.

title: 篝火#10 WSF - CJE | へろー クッパ vs DFM | ザクレイ ピット - スマブラ 大会 Kagaribi#10 Winner's Semis
篝火#10 WSF - CJE | へろー クッパ vs DFM | ザクレイ ピット - スマブラ 大会 Kagaribi#10 Winner's Semis
caption: Sees Bowser's Neutral B and punishes with Dair into Down Throw to Fair, sending Bowser offstage. Pit follows offstage threatening a follow-up to bait the airdodge. Dair doesn't meteor but forces a ledge grab, maintaining advantage. Catches Bowser's jump getup landing with Nair to push him back to ledge, then commits to a deep Fair for the KO. Excellent clip showing superb advantage maintenance.

title: 篝火#10 WSF - CJE | へろー クッパ vs DFM | ザクレイ ピット - スマブラ 大会 Kagaribi#10 Winner's Semis
篝火#10 WSF - CJE | へろー クッパ vs DFM | ザクレイ ピット - スマブラ 大会 Kagaribi#10 Winner's Semis
篝火#10 WSF - CJE | へろー クッパ vs DFM | ザクレイ ピット - スマブラ 大会 Kagaribi#10 Winner's Semis
caption: Down Throw into Bair pushing offstage, then a bold Dair during a scramble. Bowser tries to contest with Dair mash, but gets calmly met with a shield into Fsmash for maximum punish. Considering the context of Kagaribi winners semifinals full set, I'd give this 5 points.

title: 篝火#10 WSF - CJE | へろー クッパ vs DFM | ザクレイ ピット - スマブラ 大会 Kagaribi#10 Winner's Semis
caption: Just a KO from a placed Bair during a scramble, but considering it's Kagaribi Winners Semifinals going to a full set last stock, sending the crowd hype through the roof, this clip deserves 4 points.

title: 篝火#10 WSF - CJE | へろー クッパ vs DFM | ザクレイ ピット - スマブラ 大会 Kagaribi#10 Winner's Semis
caption: An incredible, hype clip at its finest. After taking Bowser's Side B with a danger zone flash that nearly meant a KO, surviving, then reversing with Utilt into Uair. The roaring crowd, commentary hype, and player camera all combine into an outstanding clip.

title: EPI2 FINAL LR1 アカキクス vs しゅーとん スマブラ 大会
caption: Reading the opponent's airdodge to avoid a straightforward landing punish, then covering the endlag with Bair for the KO. Skillful play but a common sight so 2 points.

S Factor 12 - Spargo (Piranha Plant) Vs. Mata (ZSS) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
S Factor 12 - Spargo (Piranha Plant) Vs. Mata (ZSS) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: A rather embarrassing KO. Lands Dsmash and goes for Flip Jump to finish, but gets the stomp hitbox instead of the kick, resulting in insufficient meteor force. Gets caught by the opponent's Up B recovery and stage spiked instead.

title: S Factor 12 - Spargo (Piranha Plant) Vs. Mata (ZSS) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Applied Neutral B to pressure ledge getup, then covered the return with Dair. Didn't get a meteor and didn't KO directly, but the knockback angle left the opponent short on distance for the KO.

title: S Factor 12 - Spargo (Piranha Plant) Vs. Mata (ZSS) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Confirmed Jab being shielded and punished with Usmash. A solid punish, but nothing particularly outstanding, so around 2 points.

title: S Factor 12 - Spargo (Piranha Plant) Vs. Mata (ZSS) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
S Factor 12 - Spargo (Piranha Plant) Vs. Mata (ZSS) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: A read clip placing Neutral B against Zero Suit Samus's platform drop Fair for the KO. A successful read, but the play itself is standard, so 3 points is fair.

title: S Factor 12 - Spargo (Piranha Plant) Vs. Mata (ZSS) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: A clean ledge trap clip. Anti-air Neutral B into Fair to push offstage, Nair to maintain advantage, Ftilt to push out again, and finished with Down B. The varied move usage makes this a 5-point clip.

title: S Factor 12 - Spargo (Piranha Plant) Vs. Mata (ZSS) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
S Factor 12 - Spargo (Piranha Plant) Vs. Mata (ZSS) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Zero Suit Samus Flip Kick into tech-read Dsmash into Up B for the KO. The combo route is standard, but the Dsmash placement reading the tech direction is impressive.

title: S Factor 12 - Spargo (Piranha Plant) Vs. Mata (ZSS) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: A clip driven mostly by luck. Piranha Plant's Neutral B comes out unexpectedly and catches ZSS off guard. More of a fluke than player skill, and too short, so 1 point.

title: S Factor 12 - Spargo (Piranha Plant) Vs. Mata (ZSS) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Hits Dsmash on ledge getup into Up B for the KO. The combo route is very standard, but the clean confirm on neutral getup is worth noting, so 3 points.

title: S Factor 12 - Spargo (Piranha Plant) Vs. Mata (ZSS) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: A high-level play landing anti-air Bair against Flip Jump. Precise positioning ensures 4 points.

title: S Factor 12 - LittN! (Greninja) Vs. BetaMan (Mewtwo, Ganondorf) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
S Factor 12 - LittN! (Greninja) Vs. BetaMan (Mewtwo, Ganondorf) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
S Factor 12 - LittN! (Greninja) Vs. BetaMan (Mewtwo, Ganondorf) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
S Factor 12 - LittN! (Greninja) Vs. BetaMan (Mewtwo, Ganondorf) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Greninja places a Bair reading a jump, but gets landing punished from below with a Fair. A good play, but it feels more like it was just thrown out rather than a deliberate read, so 2 points is appropriate.

title: S Factor 12 - LittN! (Greninja) Vs. BetaMan (Mewtwo, Ganondorf) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
S Factor 12 - LittN! (Greninja) Vs. BetaMan (Mewtwo, Ganondorf) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Places Utilt on Ganondorf's neutral getup and follows up with Uair for a simple KO. Ganondorf was throwing out Dtilt, indicating the Utilt wasn't a perfect read on the getup, so 2 points.

title: S Factor 12 - LittN! (Greninja) Vs. BetaMan (Mewtwo, Ganondorf) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
caption: Pure coincidence clip. Ganondorf randomly places a Dsmash that happens to catch Greninja's landing. Results speak for themselves, but it's just a shrug-worthy moment, so 1 point.

title: S Factor 12 - LittN! (Greninja) Vs. BetaMan (Mewtwo, Ganondorf) Smash Ultimate - SSBU

title: 【スマブラSP】IMPACT MAJOR#1 サブ配信 ft. Miya, Shuton, アカキクス, Yaura, 雨飴, Leaf, Reno, M0tsunabE, and more...!

title: 【スマブラSP】IMPACT MAJOR#1 サブ配信 ft. Miya, Shuton, アカキクス, Yaura, 雨飴, Leaf, Reno, M0tsunabE, and more...!

caption: Throws the spent sword as an item for an edgeguard KO. Very simple in concept but somewhat technical, so 2 points.

title: 【スマブラSP】IMPACT MAJOR#1 サブ配信 ft. Miya, Shuton, アカキクス, Yaura, 雨飴, Leaf, Reno, M0tsunabE, and more...!
caption: Perfectly airdodges Robin's Nair then KOs with Ftilt on landing. Chrom's reaction and punish decision are impressive, but the execution itself is simple, so around 3 points.

title: 【スマブラSP】IMPACT MAJOR#1 サブ配信 ft. Miya, Shuton, アカキクス, Yaura, 雨飴, Leaf, Reno, M0tsunabE, and more...!
caption: Robin tries to avoid Chrom's jab placement at ledge by using ledge drop double jump, but Chrom's second jab connects and he immediately confirms into Bair. Chrom's hitconfirm precision stands out.

title: 【スマブラSP】IMPACT MAJOR#1 サブ配信 ft. Miya, Shuton, アカキクス, Yaura, 雨飴, Leaf, Reno, M0tsunabE, and more...!
caption: Hits Side B placed to cover ledge getup, then perfectly layers Nair on top for the KO. A signature Robin combo, but Robin's rarity as a character earns it 4 points.

title: 【スマブラSP】IMPACT MAJOR#1 サブ配信 ft. Miya, Shuton, アカキクス, Yaura, 雨飴, Leaf, Reno, M0tsunabE, and more...!
caption: Used early Up B against Robin attempting to edgeguard, catching and spiking them while grabbing ledge safely, as Robin fell to a meteor. A great technical play.

title: 【スマブラSP】IMPACT MAJOR#1 サブ配信 ft. Miya, Shuton, アカキクス, Yaura, 雨飴, Leaf, Reno, M0tsunabE, and more...!
caption: Placed Nair as Chrom used ledge drop double jump, sending Chrom at a very low angle where he couldn't recover. A tech placement considering the opponent's poor recovery, but the ending evokes helplessness rather than excitement, so the rating won't be that high.

title: 【スマブラSP】IMPACT MAJOR#1 サブ配信 ft. Miya, Shuton, アカキクス, Yaura, 雨飴, Leaf, Reno, M0tsunabE, and more...!
caption: Weathered Robin's attacks and punished with an optimal Fsmash landing punish for the KO. Bold play going for maximum damage, 4 points is fair.

caption: Pushed offstage with Bair, then landed the Up B shockwave precisely for the edgeguard. Against Chrom's poor recovery, choosing an effective edgeguard option shows strategic thinking, and the precision of landing the shockwave is high. Worth 4 points or more.

title: 【スマブラSP】IMPACT MAJOR#1 サブ配信 ft. Miya, Shuton, アカキクス, Yaura, 雨飴, Leaf, Reno, M0tsunabE, and more...!

title: 【スマブラSP】IMPACT MAJOR#1 サブ配信 ft. Miya, Shuton, アカキクス, Yaura, 雨飴, Leaf, Reno, M0tsunabE, and more...!
caption: A great play dodging Rosalina & Luma's Nair with a retreating dash and countering with Up B. Clear display of excellent push-and-pull gameplay.

title: 【スマブラSP】IMPACT MAJOR#1 サブ配信 ft. Miya, Shuton, アカキクス, Yaura, 雨飴, Leaf, Reno, M0tsunabE, and more...!
caption: Hits Luma directly with Neutral B, and the well-positioned Luma's Fsmash connects on Ken near the ledge for the KO. Excellent Luma management on display.

title: 【スマブラSP】IMPACT MAJOR#1 サブ配信 ft. Miya, Shuton, アカキクス, Yaura, 雨飴, Leaf, Reno, M0tsunabE, and more...!

title: 【スマブラSP】IMPACT MAJOR#1 サブ配信 ft. Miya, Shuton, アカキクス, Yaura, 雨飴, Leaf, Reno, M0tsunabE, and more...!

caption: Placement Uair reading the jump for the KO. Cleanly punishes Ken's jump attempting to escape the corner.

caption: Got hit by the opponent's Side B but dove in with Bair. Pretty standard dash dance interaction, not much to say, so it settles at 2 points.

title: 【スマブラSP】IMPACT MAJOR#1 サブ配信 ft. Miya, Shuton, アカキクス, Yaura, 雨飴, Leaf, Reno, M0tsunabE, and more...!

title: 【スマブラSP】IMPACT MAJOR#1 サブ配信 ft. Miya, Shuton, アカキクス, Yaura, 雨飴, Leaf, Reno, M0tsunabE, and more...!

caption: After launching Pac-Man with Dtilt, also knocks Fire Hydrant with Dtilt for pressure. When Pac-Man uses Nair to cancel the Hydrant, immediately dashes in with grab and KOs with Up Throw. Not hugely notable, but using the opponent's Hydrant for pressure earns 2 points.

title: 篝火#10 WSF - CJE | へろー クッパ vs DFM | ザクレイ ピット - スマブラ 大会 Kagaribi#10 Winner's Semis
caption: Whiff punishes Pit's missed grab with a guaranteed Fair for the KO. Doesn't let the small opening slip away, but the kill itself is very straightforward, so 2 points.

title: 篝火 KAGARIBI #13 DAY2 Main Stream ft.Sparg0, あcola,ドラ右,ミーヤー,Zomba,しゅーとん,Syrup,Light,あしも,...and more!
caption: After being sent offstage by Bayonetta's Bair, fails to land on the offstage block, falls, and can't reach with Up B — resulting in an SD.

title: Smash at the Paramount SSBU - eU | Samsora (Peach) Vs. Liquid | Dabuz (Palu, Rosa) Ultimate WS
caption: An incredible clip. Peach throws out a Fair against Rosalina & Luma's recovery but barely misses the KO, and the surviving Luma retaliates with Uair. After Rosalina & Luma barely makes it back on stage, Peach catches up with a Bair, but again the surviving Luma counters with Utilt. Finally, Rosalina & Luma punishes Peach's ledge getup with Nair and closes it out with an edgeguard Bair for the win. The caster's hype energy makes this an extremely entertaining clip.

title: S Factor 12 - LittN! (Greninja) Vs. BetaMan (Mewtwo, Ganondorf) Smash Ultimate - SSBU
